name: Windows utilities · Report helpers (multi_scripts_lib/work/report)
description: Report-generation helpers under multi_scripts_lib/work/report—structured outputs for operations with sanitisation guidance before external sharing.
longDescription: Helpers under `multi_scripts_lib/work/report` for assembling or formatting operational reports on Windows. Intended for repeatable automation where data pulled from hosts may include sensitive identifiers; outputs should be reviewed or redacted before leaving trusted boundaries. High-level summary here; implementation detail lives in the linked source tree.
features: Intended for repeatable reporting automation with predictable output locations
Data-handling awareness: operational fields may require redaction in shared reports
highlights: Illustrates breadth of the multi_scripts_lib workbench
challenges: Light documentation relative to code size.
solutions: Treat the source tree as the reference; extend docs if the tool grows into a standalone product.
security: Sanitise data before embedding into reports shared externally
